Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

Shift 6 (You may pay 6 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Scar.)

text: BRING BACK TO LIFE {E}, 3 {I} — Return a character card with Support from your discard to your hand.

name: Arthur
text: STUDENT Whenever this character quests, you may return another chosen character of yours to your hand to gain 2 lore.
flavor_text: "Hmm.. what spell should I try next?"

name: Blue Fairy
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
ETHEREAL GLOW Whenever you play a Floodborn character, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: "To make Geppetto's wish come true will be entirely up to you." —Blue Fairy

name: Chip the Teacup
flavor_text: "Wanna see me do a trick?"

name: Dr. Facilier
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Elsa
text: Challenger +3 (While challenging, this character gets +3 {S}.)
flavor_text: The power of ice may not stop the flood, but it will help protect Lorcana.

name: Fairy Godmother
flavor_text: "Use a humdrum spell, and you'll end up with humdrum magic. I like my magic to have something special!"

name: Fairy Godmother
text:
Shift 2 (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Fairy Godmother.)
FORGET THE COACH, HERE'S A SWORD Whenever this character quests, your characters gain Challenger +3 and “When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand” this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)

flavor_text: "We'll have to hurry, because even miracles take a little time."

name: HeiHei
text: HE'S BACK! When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand.
flavor_text: Power. Beauty. HeiHei.

name: Jiminy Cricket
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
THAT STILL, SMALL VOICE When you play this character, if you have a character named Pinocchio in play, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: "Say, that's pretty swell."

name: Kuzco
text: OK, WHERE AM I? When this character is banished, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: "So there I was. Perfectly in control of the situation."

name: Madam Mim
text:
CHASING THE RABBIT When you play this character, banish her or return another chosen character of yours to your hand.
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: Madam Mim
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
I WIN, I WIN! When you play this character, banish her or return another 2 chosen characters of yours to your hand.
flavor_text: "Did I say no purple dragons? Did I?"

name: Madam Mim
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Madam Mim.)
GRUESOME AND GRIM {E} — Play a character with cost 4 or less for free. They gain Rush. At the end of the turn, banish them. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: Madam Mim
text: JUST YOU WAIT When you play this character, banish her or return another chosen character of yours to your hand.
flavor_text: "I've got you rattled now!"

name: Merlin
text: READY OR NOT! When you play this character and when he leaves play, chosen character gains Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text: He'll be out of this in a snap!

name: Merlin
text: HERE I COME! When you play this character and when he leaves play, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text:
"He always was a stubborn old goat."
—Madam Mim

name: Merlin
text: HOPPITY HIP! When you play this character and when he leaves play, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: It was turning out to be a bad hare day.

name: Merlin
text: BATTLE OF WITS Whenever one of your other characters is returned to your hand from play, this character gets +1 {L} this turn.
flavor_text: "Oh, blast it all—I can't make up my mind."

name: Merlin
text: LOOK BEFORE YOU LEAP When you play this character and when he leaves play, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavor_text: "You can't always trust to luck, boy."

name: Peter Pan's Shadow
fullName: Peter Pan's Shadow - Not Sewn On
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
TIPTOE Your other characters with Rush gain Evasive.

name: Pinocchio
flavor_text:
"With that personality, that profile, that physique... Why, I can see your name in lights, lights six feet high."
—Honest John

name: Pinocchio
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Pinocchio.)
LISTEN TO YOUR CONSCIENCE When you play this character, you may return chosen character or item with cost 3 or less to their player's hand.
flavor_text: He raced into the Inklands without a thought.

name: Pinocchio
text: TELLING LIES When you play this character, you may exert chosen opposing character.
flavor_text:
"A lie keeps growing and growing until it's as plain as the nose on your face."
—Blue Fairy

name: Winnie the Pooh
flavor_text: He'd always felt a kinship with honey. They were both golden, and sweet, and likely to end up in sticky situations.

name: Yzma
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Yzma.)
CRUEL IRONY When you play this character, shuffle another chosen character card into their player's deck. That player draws 2 cards.

name: Yzma
flavor_text:
Yzma: "Llamas! All I see when I close my eyes is llamas!"
Kronk: "Weird. I just saw one in the flood. Poor little guy."

name: Gruesome and Grim
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Play a character with cost 4 or less for free. They gain Rush. At the end of the turn, banish them. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: I'm Stuck!
text: Chosen exerted character can't ready at the start of their next turn.
flavor_text: "Oh, bother—not again."

name: Legend of the Sword in the Stone
fullName: Legend of the Sword in the Stone
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text:
A legend is sung of when England was young
And knights were brave and bold

name: Binding Contract
text: FOR ALL ETERNITY {E}, {E} one of your characters — Exert chosen character.
flavor_text: Just a standard form, nothing to worry about.

name: Croquet Mallet
text: HURTLING HEDGEHOG Banish this item — Chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: Perplexing Signposts
text: TO WONDERLAND Banish this item — Return chosen character of yours to your hand.
flavor_text:
Alice: "I just wanted to ask you which way I ought to go."
Cheshire Cat: "Well, that depends on where you want to get to."

name: The Sorcerer's Spellbook
text: KNOWLEDGE {E}, 1 {I} — Gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: Illumineers seek the power of knowledge—but must be aware of the price.

name: Arthur
flavor_text:
"It's not just fancy horses and swinging a sword around, you know! A true master must use his brain as well as his blade."
—Merlin

name: Beast
text: SECOND WIND Whenever an opposing character is damaged, you may ready this character.

name: Belle
text: USE YOUR IMAGINATION While an opponent has no cards in their hand, this character gets +2 {L}.
flavor_text: There's nothing more tempting than a pile of unread books.

name: Belle
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Belle.)
THORNY ARROWS Whenever this character is challenged, the challenging character's player discards all cards in their hand.
flavor_text: She slips through the trees as easily as shadow.

name: Bucky
text: SQUEAK Whenever you play a Floodborn character, if you used Shift to play them, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text:
"There's a lot of nuance to squirrel."
—Kronk

name: Cheshire Cat
flavor_text:
Alice felt quite confused. "But I don't see much ink here at all. How can the flood still be changing the Inklands?"
"Things are always changing, you know," said the cat. "It would be quite a change if they didn't."

name: Cheshire Cat
text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cheshire Cat.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
WICKED SMILE {E} — Banish chosen damaged character.

name: Daisy Duck
text: THWART Whenever this character quests, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

name: Donald Duck
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Donald Duck.)
ALLOW ME At the start of your turn, each player may draw a card.

name: Donald Duck
text: STARTLED AWAKE Whenever you play an action, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: Heading toward a rude awakening!

name: Dr. Facilier
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
YOU'RE IN MY WORLD Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character can't quest during their next turn.

name: Enchantress
text: TRUE FORM While being challenged, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: Appearances can be deceiving.

name: Flynn Rider
flavor_text: "I love a good fan club, but they could at least try to get the nose right!"

name: Flynn Rider
fullName: Flynn Rider - His Own Biggest Fan
text:
Shift 2 (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Flynn Rider.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
ONE LAST, BIG SCORE This character gets -1 {L} for each card in your opponents' hands.

name: Gaston
text: YES, I'M INTIMIDATING While one or more opponents have no cards in their hands, this character gets +3 {S}.
flavor_text: "Don't I deserve the best?"

name: Little John
flavor_text: "What's the rush, Rob? Take a load off! There's plenty of time to go lookin' for lore lost in that crazy ink."

name: Lucifer
text: MOUSE CATCHER When you play this character, each opponent chooses and discards either 2 cards or 1 action card.
flavor_text:
"There must be something good about him."
—Cinderella

name: Pain
text: COMING, YOUR MOST LUGUBRIOUSNESS While this character has 5 {S} or more, he gets +2 {L}.
flavor_text:
"Get a move on! I'm a busy god, lots to do—meetings, curses, a little light scheming."
—Hades

name: Panic
text: I CAN HANDLE IT When you play this character, chosen character gets +2 {S} this turn. If the chosen character is named Pain, he gets +4 {S} instead.
flavor_text:
"Who says it's hard to find good help these days? Oh, yeah... ME!"
—Hades

name: Pete
text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
TAKE THAT! Whenever you play an action, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
WHO'S NEXT? While this character has 7 {S} or more, he gets +2 {L}.

name: Prince John
text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
I SENTENCE YOU Whenever your opponent discards 1 or more cards, you may draw a card for each card discarded.
flavor_text: "Taxes! Taxes! Beautiful, lovely taxes!"

name: Queen of Hearts
text: ROYAL RAGE When you play this character, deal 1 damage to chosen damaged opposing character.
flavor_text:
"You know, we could make her really angry. Shall we try?"
—Cheshire Cat

name: Ratigan
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "I've outdone myself this time! Soon I will have everything I deserve. Riches... power... an entire kingdom at my feet!"

name: Ray
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: He may be hard to follow, but his heart isn't.

name: The Queen
text: A PERFECT DISGUISE {E}, Choose and discard a character card — Gain lore equal to the discarded character's {L}.
flavor_text: "This is no ordinary apple..."

name: Tiana
flavor_text: Finding your true self will set your heart aglow.

name: Virana
flavor_text: "I must make the hard decisions to protect my daughter, especially in this unfamiliar world."

name: Bibbidi Bobbidi Boo
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Return chosen character of yours to your hand to play another character with the same cost or less for free.
flavor_text: It'll do magic, believe it or not

name: Bounce
text: Return chosen character of yours to your hand to return another chosen character to their player's hand.
flavor_text:
"Are you ready for some bouncing?"
—Tigger

name: Hypnotize
text: Each opponent chooses and discards a card. Draw a card.
flavor_text: "Look me in the eye when I'm speaking to you."

name: Improvise
text: Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn. Draw a card.
flavor_text:
Shan-Yu: "It looks like you're out of ideas."
Mulan: "Not quite!"

name: Pack Tactics
text: Gain 1 lore for each damaged character opponents have in play.
flavor_text:
Pacha: "You want to survive the jungle? Start thinking like you belong here."
Kuzco: "No problem... Grrr, look at me, I'm a jaguar."

name: Ring the Bell
text: Banish chosen damaged character.
flavor_text:
"I'm afraid that you've gone and upset me."
—Ratigan

text: SNAP! BOOM! TWANG! Banish this item — Each opponent loses 2 lore.
flavor_text: Simple in purpose, elaborate in execution—just like Ratigan.

name: Baloo
flavor_text: "The bees are buzzin' in the tree to make some honey just for me!"

name: Boun
flavor_text: "If you see any hungry faces, send 'em my way."

name: Card Soldiers
flavor_text: You'll have to deal with them sooner or later.

name: Donald Duck
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
PHOOEY! This character gets +1 {L} for each 1 damage on him.

name: Felicia
text: Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavor_text:
"This isn't how most cat-and-mouse games go, is it, Dr. Dawson?"
—Basil

name: Fidget
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: When a normal henchman just won't cut it.

name: Honest John
text: EASY STREET Whenever you play a Floodborn character, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavor_text: "A thing like that ought to be worth a fortune to someone!"

name: Lady Tremaine
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lady Tremaine.)
POWER TO RULE AT LAST When you play this character, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
flavor_text: The twelfth Rule of Villainy: If you don't have a throne, take one.

name: Lady Tremaine

flavor_text: "Make no mistake: this time I will make certain the key remains safe!"

name: Lumiere
flavor_text: When things heat up, no one can hold a candle to him.

name: Minnie Mouse
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "This goes into my top ten most fun things!"

name: Minnie Mouse
text:
Shift 2 (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Minnie Mouse.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
UNDERSEA ADVENTURE Whenever you play a second action in a turn, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.

name: Minnie Mouse
flavor_text: Zero to fun in under three seconds!

name: Mother Gothel
text: WHAT HAVE YOU DONE?! This character enters play with 3 damage.
flavor_text: Her feelings are written all over her face.

name: Mulan
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text: "I have to do something!"

name: Namaari
text: THIS SHOULDN'T TAKE LONG {E}, Banish this character — Banish chosen character.
flavor_text: "I don't need swords to beat you. They just make it more fun."

name: Queen of Hearts
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text:
The glow of lore in the flood caught her eye.
"The spellbook!" she cried. "Don't let it get away!"

name: Queen of Hearts
text:
Shift 2 (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Queen of Hearts.)
LET THE GAME BEGIN Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, you may draw a card.

name: Ratigan
text: THIS IS MY KINGDOM When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character with 3 {S} or less. Choose one of your characters and ready them. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: "This time, nothing, not even Basil, can stand in my way!"

name: Raya

flavor_text: Two parts bravery, one part cleverness, and a whole lot of determination.

name: Raya
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Raya.)
CHAMPION OF KUMANDRA Whenever this character challenges a damaged character, she takes no damage from the challenge.

name: Raya
flavor_text: "My ba dreams of a united Kumandra. I fight to honor that dream."

name: Scar
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
DADDY ISN'T HERE TO SAVE YOU During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

name: Shere Khan
text: DON'T INSULT MY INTELLIGENCE Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: The sixth Rule of Villainy: Keep your mind sharp and your claws sharper.

name: Tigger
text: ENERGETIC Whenever you play an action, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: Bouncing in to save the day!

name: Tuk Tuk
text: Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavor_text: A good friend is always ready to roll.

name: Go the Distance
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Ready chosen damaged character of yours. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. Draw a card.

name: Teeth and Ambitions
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 2 damage to chosen character of yours to deal 2 damage to another chosen character.
flavor_text:
Of course, quid pro quo, you're expected
To take certain duties on board

name: The Most Diabolical Scheme
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Banish chosen Villain of yours to banish chosen character.
flavor_text:
Now comes the real tour de force
Tricky and wicked, of course

name: What Did You Call Me?
text: Chosen damaged character gets +3 {S} this turn.
flavor_text:
"No one can have a higher opinion of you than I have, and I think you're a slimy, contemptible sewer rat!"
—Basil

name: You Can Fly!
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Dinner Bell
text: YOU KNOW WHAT HAPPENS {E}, 2 {I} — Draw cards equal to the damage on chosen character of yours, then banish them.
flavor_text: The delicate sound of impending doom.

name: Peter Pan's Dagger
text: Your characters with Evasive get +1 {S}.
flavor_text: Like so much other lore, Peter Pan's dagger was safe in the Great Illuminary until the flood.

name: Sword in the Stone
text: {E}, 2 {I} — Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn for each 1 damage on them.
flavor_text: "Whoso pulleth out this sword of this stone and anvil is rightwise king born of England."

name: Alice
text:
GOOD ADVICE Your other characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
WHAT DID I DO? While this character has 10 {S} or more, she gets +4 {L}.

name: Basil
text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Basil.)
THERE'S ALWAYS A CHANCE If you used Shift to play this character, you may draw 2 cards when he enters play.
flavor_text: A solution always presents itself.

name: Basil
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "What an ingenious device! If its light is refracted through these, then its images must resolve somewhere below."

name: Basil
flavor_text: "There is no question: something is afoot in the Great Illuminary."

name: Caterpillar
flavor_text: "Keep your tempo."

name: Cogsworth
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cogsworth.)
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
UNWIND Your other characters gain Resist +1 (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

name: Cogsworth
text: WAIT A MINUTE Your characters with Reckless gain “{E} — Gain 1 lore.”
flavor_text: "This has gone far enough. I'm in charge here."

name: Cruella De Vil
text: NOW GET GOING During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
flavor_text: "Isn't it just gorgeous, darling? And just as stylish as I am."

name: Cruella De Vil
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Cruella De Vil.)
OH, NO YOU DON'T Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "It's ink couture, darling. I wear only the best!"

name: Duke Weaselton
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "It's Wee-sel-ton."

name: Gaston
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gaston.)
DEVELOPED BRAIN When you play this character, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Grand Pabbie
text: ANCIENT INSIGHT Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, gain 2 lore.
flavor_text: When he talks, even the sky listens.

name: Hiram Flaversham
text: ARTIFICER When you play this character and whenever he quests, you may banish one of your items to draw 2 cards.
flavor_text: His creations are even more wondrous with the Illuminary's resources at his fingertips.

name: James
text: NEVER, EVER LOSE SIGHT When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Jasmine
text: I'M A FAST LEARNER When you play this character, remove up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours.
flavor_text: She may be young, but she's got the spirit of a true leader.

name: Judy Hopps
text: DON'T CALL ME CUTE When you play this character, you may banish chosen item. Its player draws a card.
flavor_text: "I'll get to the bottom of what happened with that locked lorebook. You can count on me!"

name: Mrs. Judson
text: TIDY UP Whenever you play a Floodborn character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "I know just the thing. Let me fetch you a pot of tea and some of my fresh cheese crumpets."

name: Nick Wilde
text: IT'S CALLED A HUSTLE When you play this character, you may return an item card named Pawpsicle from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: "It's criminal how good these things taste!"

name: Noi
text: HIDE AND SEEK While you have an item in play, this character gains Resist +1 and Ward. (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1. Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

name: Owl
flavor_text: "For instance, based on the quality of the light and the subtle change in wind direction, I can safely say that it is time for tea."

name: Prince Charming
fullName: Prince Charming - Heir to the Throne
flavor_text: He'd searched across the Inklands for the young woman who'd stolen his heart at the ball, only to find more mysteries.

name: Rabbit
flavor_text:
Pooh: "Isn't there anybody here at all?"
Rabbit: "Nobody!"
Pooh: "Somebody's there... because somebody must have said 'Nobody.'"

name: Sisu
text: I TRUST YOU Whenever this character quests, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavor_text: No matter her shape, you can't mistake her heart.

name: The Nokk
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: As elusive as water.

name: Winnie the Pooh
fullName: Winnie the Pooh - Having a Think
text: HUNNY POT Whenever this character quests, you may put a card from your hand into your inkwell facedown.
flavor_text: When he thought, he thought in the most thoughtful way he could think.

name: Falling Down the Rabbit Hole
text: Each player chooses one of their characters and puts them into their inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: Down, down, down she went, floating in a swirl of ink. How curious!

name: Four Dozen Eggs
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Your characters gain Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

name: Launch
text: Banish chosen item of yours to deal 5 damage to chosen character.
flavor_text: Ready... aim... coconut?

name: Nothing to Hide
text: Each opponent reveals their hand. Draw a card.
flavor_text: Helps you avoid unpleasant surprises.

name: Fang Crossbow
text:
CAREFUL AIM {E}, 2 {I} — Chosen character gets -2 {S} this turn.
STAY BACK! {E}, Banish this item — Banish chosen Dragon character.

name: Gumbo Pot
text: THE BEST I'VE EVER TASTED {E} — Remove 1 damage each from up to 2 chosen characters.
flavor_text:
"A gift this special just got to be shared."
—James

name: Maurice's Workshop
text: LOOKING FOR THIS? Whenever you play another item, you may pay 1 {I} to draw a card.
flavor_text: The solution you need could be just a few adjustments away.

name: Pawpsicle
text:
JUMBO POP When you play this item, you may draw a card.
THAT'S REDWOOD Banish this item — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

name: Sardine Can
text: FLIGHT CABIN Your exerted characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
flavor_text:
"Flight 3759 boarding now! Let's go get that lore!"
—Orville

name: Beast
text: YOU'RE NOT WELCOME HERE When you play this character, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.
flavor_text: Woe to the one who draws his gaze.

name: Beast
text: SHIELD ANOTHER Whenever one of your other characters would be dealt damage, put that many damage counters on this character instead.
flavor_text: "You'll have to go through me first."

name: Beast
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Beast.)
IT'S BETTER THIS WAY At the start of your turn, if this character has no damage, draw a card. Otherwise, he gets +4 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "It must be my destiny—to remain a beast forever."

name: Benja
fullName: Benja - Guardian of the Dragon Gem
text: WE HAVE A CHOICE When you play this character, you may banish chosen item.
flavor_text: "Don't mistake spirit for skill."

name: Chief Bogo

text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Hercules.)

(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

Wings spread wide with flame
Spring sings its ancient chorus
And green renews its claim

flavor_text:
"A cobweb's strand to hold her fast
An eagle's eye to see her well
Sands of time to steal her past
Thus I cast my magic spell!"

—Maleficent

(A character with cost 1 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)

name: Helga Sinclair
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Helga Sinclair.)

text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

spellbook, and Peter was the first to volunteer.

—Sheriff of Nottingham

name: Robin Hood
flavor_text:

running."

name: Shenzi
text:
I'LL HANDLE THIS While this character is at a location, she gets +3 {S}.

name: Sir Hiss
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Skippy
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

name: Stitch
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Ursula

name: Wildcat
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

the Pride Lands all the same!"

name: Has Set My Heaaaaaaart . . .
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Banish chosen item.
flavor_text:
He's not real smart
And yet, he's touched my little cowhide heart

name: I Will Find My Way
text:
(A character with cost 1 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character of yours gets +2 {S} this turn. They may move to a location for free.
flavor_text:
I would go most anywhere
To feel like I belong

name: Strike a Good Match
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text:
Please bring honor to us
Please bring honor to us all

name: Airfoil
text: I GOT TO BE GOING {E} — If you've played 2 or more actions this turn, draw a card.
flavor_text: Discovered in the lost Sea Duck, it looked good as new.

name: Robin's Bow
text:
FOREST'S GIFT {E} — Deal 1 damage to chosen damaged character or location.
A BIT OF A LARK Whenever a character of yours named Robin Hood quests, you may ready this item.
flavor_text:
"The forest always provides just what you need."
—Robin Hood

name: Starlight Vial
text:
EFFICIENT ENERGY {E} — You pay 2 {I} less for the next action you play this turn.
TRAP 2 {I}, Banish this item — Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text: In the wrong hands, this vial of magic could be disastrous.

name: De Vil Manor
flavor_text:
"They say the ol' place is haunted, or bewitched, or some such fiddle-faddle."
—Colonel

name: Fang
text: SURROUNDED BY WATER Characters gain Ward and Evasive while here. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge. Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
flavor_text: A nation protected by fierce assassins and their even fiercer cats.

name: Kuzco's Palace
fullName: Kuzco's Palace - Home of the Emperor
text: CITY WALLS Whenever a character is challenged and banished while here, banish the challenging character.
flavor_text: "Sure it's a little small, but also it DOESN'T HAVE A POOL!" —Kuzco

name: Ariel
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
INSPIRING VOICE Whenever you play a song, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: Shipwrecks are great places to find lore—and hide from sharks!

name: Billy Bones
fullName: Billy Bones - Keeper of the Map
flavor_text:
"He's after me chest, that fiendish cyborg and his
band of cutthroats."

name: Captain Hook
text:
NEMESIS During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.
MAN-TO-MAN Characters named Peter Pan lose Evasive and can't gain Evasive.

name: Della Duck
text: Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavor_text:
"I survived the moon. How tough could the flooded
Inklands be?"

name: HeiHei
text: MINDLESS WANDERING Once per turn, when this character moves to a location, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavor_text: Considering the coconut.

name: Hydra
text: WATCH THE TEETH Whenever this character is dealt damage, deal that much damage to chosen opposing character.
flavor_text: More heads are better than one.

name: Jim Hawkins
text:
THIS IS IT! When you play this character, you may play a location with cost 4 or less for free.
TAKE THE HELM Whenever you play a location, this character may move there for free.
flavor_text:
"You're gonna rattle the stars, you are."
—John Silver

name: Jim Hawkins
flavor_text:
If you want a bigger reward, you've got to take
bigger risks.

name: Kakamora
text: PLUNDER When you play this character, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavor_text: There's a bunch more where he came from.

name: Madame Medusa
text: THAT TERRIBLE WOMAN When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 3 {S} or less.
flavor_text:
"Finding lore will be as easy as taking candy from
children."

name: Maui
text:
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
IN MA BELLY Whenever a character of yours named HeiHei quests, this character gets +1 {L} and loses Reckless this turn.
flavor_text: "You got any more of those chickens hanging around?"

name: Maui
text:
THIS MISSION IS CURSED This character can't ready at the start of your turn.
I GOT YOUR BACK 2 {I} — Ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: Always ready to make a splash.

name: Milo Thatch
text: I'M YOUR MAN! While this character is at a location, he gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: "My grandpa never told me about this place!"

name: Moana
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Moana.)
WELCOME TO MY BOAT Whenever this character quests while at a location, ready all other characters here. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

name: Moana
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: No fire or storm will keep her from her goal.

name: Nutsy
flavor_text:
"Nutsy, button your beak."
—Trigger

name: Peter Pan
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
OVER HERE, TINK While you have a character named Tinker Bell in play, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text:
With Peter, plans often meant diving headlong into
danger.

name: Peter Pan
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Peter Pan.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
YOU'RE NEXT! Whenever he challenges a Pirate character, this character takes no damage from the challenge.

name: Prince Eric
text: SURPRISE MANEUVER When this character is banished, you may banish chosen character.
flavor_text:
The storm came out of nowhere, forcing Eric
to turn back before he reached the mysterious
structure at the edge of Lorcana.

name: Scroop
text: BRUTE While this character has damage, he gets +3 {S}.
flavor_text:
Always keep him in front of you. And downwind,
if possible.

name: Simba
flavor_text:
He'll join the hunt for lore after he's had a quick
snack.

name: Slightly
text:
THE FOX If you have a character named Peter Pan in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "Pirates sure are easy to trick!"

name: Stitch
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text:
"Who thought giving him power armor was a
good idea?!"
—Nani

name: Trigger
text: OLD BETSY Your characters named Nutsy get +1 {L}.
flavor_text:
"Criminently, Trigger! Point that peashooter the
other way."
—Sheriff of Nottingham

name: Webby Vanderquack
flavor_text:
"Finding lore is a lot easier when you have a
grappling hook!"

name: Divebomb
text: Banish one of your characters with Reckless to banish chosen character with less {S} than that character.

name: I've Got a Dream
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Ready chosen character of yours at a location. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. Gain lore equal to that location's {L}.
flavor_text:
Tor would like to quit and be a florist
Gunther does interior design

name: On Your Feet! Now!
text: Ready all your characters and deal 1 damage to each of them. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: "Catch them! Before they get away!"

name: Voyage
text: Move up to 2 characters of yours to the same location for free.
flavor_text: "We were voyagers! Why'd we stop?" —Moana

name: Maui's Fish Hook
text:
IT'S MAUI TIME! If you have a character named Maui in play, you may use this item's Shapeshift ability for free.
SHAPESHIFT {E}, 2 {I} — Choose one:
• Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
• Chosen character gets +3 {S} this turn.

name: Sumerian Talisman
text: SOURCE OF MAGIC During your turn, whenever one of your characters is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Summoned spirit from the dark
Show thyself before this arc."
—Lena Sabrewing

name: Agrabah
flavor_text:
"Welcome to Agrabah, city of mystery, of enchantment, and the finest
merchandise this side of the river."
—Merchant

name: Jolly Roger
text:
LOOK ALIVE, YOU SWABS! Characters gain Rush while here. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
ALL HANDS ON DECK! Your Pirate characters may move here for free.

name: RLS Legacy
text:
THIS IS OUR SHIP Characters gain Evasive while here. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
HEAVE TOGETHER NOW If you have a character here, you pay 2 {I} less to move a character of yours here.

name: Audrey Ramirez
text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
SPARE PARTS Whenever this character quests, ready one of your items.
flavor_text: "How'd you break this thing, anyway?"

name: Captain Amelia
text: DISCIPLINE During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
flavor_text:
"I've spotted a strange structure on the horizon.
Hard to port, helmsman!"

name: Dewey
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "I got it! I knew I could do it! Dewey for the win!"

name: Flintheart Glomgold
text: THEY'LL NEVER SEE IT COMING! During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
flavor_text: "Nobody tells Flintheart Glomgold what to do!"

name: Genie
flavor_text:
"Ten thousand years will give you such a crick in
the neck!"

name: Gramma Tala
fullName: Gramma Tala - Keeper of Ancient Stories
text: THERE WAS ONLY OCEAN When you play this character, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavor_text:
Listen with your whole heart, and the ancestors will
guide you.

name: Gramma Tala
fullName: Gramma Tala - Spirit of the Ocean
text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gramma Tala.)
DO YOU KNOW WHO YOU ARE? Whenever a card is put into your inkwell, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text:
She will always be with you, no matter how far your
journey takes you.

name: Gyro Gearloose
text: NOW TRY TO KEEP UP {E} — Put an item card from your discard on the top of your deck.
flavor_text: "Maybe the bulb tech will be less evil this time..."

name: Huey
text:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
THREE NEPHEWS Whenever this character quests, if you have characters named Dewey and Louie in play, you may draw 3 cards.
flavor_text: "This looks like part of a larger crystal!"

name: King Louie
flavor_text:
"Hold up, cuz. Why not sit back and enjoy some
sweet beats?"

name: Kit Cloudkicker
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Kit Cloudkicker.)
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

name: Kit Cloudkicker
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text:
Thrilled to have his airfoil back, he launched into
the Inklands.

name: Louie
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "Found the last one!"

name: Maid Marian
text: HIGHBORN LADY When you play this character, chosen character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: She makes every space more beautiful.

name: Mama Odie
text: THIS GOING TO BE GOOD Whenever you play a song, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "You dig a little deeper, you'll find everything you need."

name: Pluto
flavor_text:
Pluto's job was to keep Gustav's attention so
Minnie could get to the cave.

name: Rufus
text: TOO OLD TO BE CHASING MICE When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "Faith is a bluebird you see from afar."

name: Scrooge McDuck
fullName: Scrooge McDuck - Richest Duck in the World
text:
I'M GOING HOME! During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
I DIDN'T GET RICH BY BEING STUPID During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may play an item for free.
flavor_text: He can make money anywhere.

name: Scrooge McDuck
text: TREASURE FINDER Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {I} less for the next item you play this turn.
flavor_text:
A strange new world is the perfect place to make a
strange new fortune!

name: The Queen
text: CALCULATING AND VAIN Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.
flavor_text:
She has only one question, and she'd better like
the answer.

name: Tinker Bell
text: I CAN USE THAT Whenever one of your items is banished, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: She lives in a world of possibilities.

name: Wendy Darling
fullName: Wendy Darling - Authority on Peter Pan
text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)

name: Distract
text: Chosen character gets -2 {S} this turn. Draw a card.

name: Friend Like Me
text:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Each player puts the top 3 cards of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: You got some power in your corner now

name: How Far I'll Go
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Repair
text: Remove up to 3 damage from one of your locations or characters.
flavor_text:
"I'm thinkin' about opening a shop here. What do you
think?"

name: Aurelian Gyrosensor
text: SEEKING KNOWLEDGE Whenever one of your characters quests, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavor_text:
"It can point you toward lost lore, but if you're not careful,
it'll lead you off a cliff."
—Venturo, an Illumineer

name: Heart of Te Fiti
text: CREATE LIFE {E}, 2 {I} — Put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: It takes a pure heart to calm the raging storm within.

name: Lucky Dime
text: NUMBER ONE {E}, 2 {I} — Choose a character of yours and gain lore equal to their {L}.
flavor_text: This one simple coin changed Scrooge's life forever.

name: Scrooge's Top Hat
text: BUSINESS EXPERTISE {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next item you play this turn.
flavor_text: Just the thing to top off another brilliant deal.

name: Vault Door
text: SEALED AWAY Your locations and characters at locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text:
Only Scrooge knows about this vault. And he's going to
keep it that way.

name: Belle's House
text: LABORATORY If you have a character here, you pay 1 {I} less to play items.
flavor_text: Some of the most important tools in Lorcana are crafted here.

name: McDuck Manor
flavor_text:
"It's only the coolest home in Lorcana!"
—Webby Vanderquack

name: Motunui
text: REINCARNATION Whenever a character is banished while here, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Chief Tui
flavor_text: "Look at our home! There is no better place to be."

name: Eeyore
text: Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "Not much of a roadblock, but I suppose I'll do."

name: Gustav the Giant
fullName: Gustav the Giant - Terror of the Kingdom
text:
ALL TIED UP This character enters play exerted and can't ready at the start of your turn.
BREAK FREE During your turn, whenever one of your other characters banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready this character.

name: Hades
text: CALL THE TITANS {E} — Ready your Titan characters.
flavor_text:
"Brothers! Titans! Look at you in your squalid prison.
Who put you down there?"

name: Helga Sinclair
text: Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavor_text: "That was an order, not a suggestion. Let's go!"

name: John Silver
text: CHART YOUR OWN COURSE For each location you have in play, this character gains Resist +1 and gets +1 {L}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "I was never much good at games. Always hated to lose."

name: Kida
text: Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavor_text: She's seen strange things before, but nothing like this.

name: Little John
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Little John.)
OKAY, BIG SHOT While this character is exerted, your characters with Bodyguard gain Resist +1 and get +1 {L}. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

name: Little John
text:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
DISGUISED During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

name: Lythos
text:
Resist +2 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)
STONE SKIN {E} — Chosen character gains Resist +2 this turn.
flavor_text: "Crush Zeus!"

name: Mickey Mouse
text: LET'S TAKE A LOOK This character gets +1 {S} for each location you have in play.
flavor_text:
Mickey knew just where to start searching for
the Sorcerer's Hat, but he didn't expect it to be
guarded.

name: Mickey Mouse
text: SOUND THE CALL {E}, 2 {I} — Play a character for free.

name: Minnie Mouse
text: JOURNEY While this character is at a location, she gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: She'll never cave under pressure.

name: Mr. Smee
text: OH DEAR, DEAR, DEAR At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted and you don't have a Captain character in play, deal 1 damage to this character.
flavor_text: "Catch those little—OUCH!"

name: Mufasa
fullName: Mufasa - Champion of the Pride Lands
flavor_text: Even his name makes enemies quiver in fear.

name: Nala
flavor_text: "Pinned ya again."

name: Pyros
text: ERUPTION During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may ready chosen character.
flavor_text: "Melt Zeus!"

name: Razoul
text: LOOKY HERE While this character has no damage, he gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text:
"There's no princess here to save you this time,
street rat."

name: Robin Hood
flavor_text:
"You call this an ambush? Tsk, tsk. It's barely a
bushwhack."

name: Robin Hood
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Robin Hood.)
SKILLED COMBATANT During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.
THE GOOD OF OTHERS When this character is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

name: Sheriff of Nottingham
text: TAXES SHOULD HURT Whenever you discard a card, you may deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character.
flavor_text:
The thirteenth Rule of Villainy: Take everything you
can, but do it with a smile.

name: Simba
text: STEP DOWN OR FIGHT When you play this character and whenever he banishes another character in a challenge during your turn, you may choose one: • Draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards. • Deal 2 damage to chosen character.
flavor_text: He's ready to restore the Pride Lands to their former glory.

name: Simba
text: TRIUMPHANT STANCE During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, chosen opposing character can't challenge during their next turn.
flavor_text:
With dangers multiplying all around, the pride needs
its guardian.

name: Thaddeus E. Klang
text: MY TEETH ARE SHARPER Whenever this character quests while at a location, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character.
flavor_text: "Soon the bells will ring in the sound of your doom!"

name: And Then Along Came Zeus
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 5 damage to chosen character or location.
flavor_text:
He hurled his thunderbolt—He zapped
Locked those suckers in a vault—They're trapped
And on his own stopped chaos in its tracks

name: Ba-Boom!
text: Deal 2 damage to chosen character or location.
flavor_text: Bigger than your average boom!

name: Olympus Would Be That Way
text: Your characters get +3 {S} while challenging a location this turn.
flavor_text:
"Now that I set you free, what is the first thing you are
going to do?"
—Hades

name: Rise of the Titans
text: Banish chosen location or item.
flavor_text:
"Oh, we're in trouble, big trouble!"
—Hermes

name: Captain Hook's Rapier
text:
GET THOSE SCURVY BRATS! During your turn, whenever one of your characters banishes another character in a challenge, you may pay 1 {I} to draw a card.
LET'S HAVE AT IT! Your characters named Captain Hook gain Challenger +1. (They get +1 {S} while challenging.)

name: Gizmosuit
text: CYBERNETIC ARMOR Banish this item — Chosen character gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
flavor_text:
It stands in the Hall of Lorcana, waiting for someone to
speak the secret words.

name: Map of Treasure Planet
text:
KEY TO THE PORTAL {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next location you play this turn.
SHOW THE WAY You pay 1 {I} less to move your characters to a location.
flavor_text:
"Gentlemen, this must be kept under lock and key."
—Captain Amelia

name: Maui's Place of Exile
fullName: Maui's Place of Exile - Hidden Island
text: ISOLATED Characters gain Resist +1 while here. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: Nothing but boulders and sand—easy to miss.

name: Nottingham
flavor_text:
Sir Hiss: "I say, sire, your mother's castle will be the perfect place to set up our scheme!"
Prince John: "Mommy!"

name: The Bayou
text: SHOW ME THE WAY Whenever a character quests while here, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text: A place to find what you need, not just what you want.

name: Chernabog
text:
THE POWER OF EVIL For each character card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
SUMMON THE SPIRITS When you play this character, shuffle all character cards from your discard into your deck.

name: Kida
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Kida.)
PERHAPS WE CAN SAVE OUR FUTURE When you play this character, all characters get -3 {S} until the start of your next turn.

name: Pride Lands
text:
WE ARE ALL CONNECTED Characters get +2 {W} while here.
LION HOME If you have a Prince or King character here, you pay 1 {I} less to play characters.

name: Jafar
text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Jafar.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
POWER BEYOND MEASURE During your turn, while this character is exerted, whenever you draw a card, gain 1 lore.

name: Maleficent
text:
DARK KNOWLEDGE Whenever this character quests, you may draw a card.
DIVINATION During your turn, whenever you draw a card, you may move 1 damage counter from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

name: The Sorcerer's Hat
text: INCREDIBLE ENERGY {E}, 1 {I} — Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put that card into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

name: Morph
text: MIMICRY You may play any character with Shift on this character as if this character had any name.

name: Ursula
text: WHAT A DEAL Whenever this character sings a song, you may play that song again from your discard for free, then put it on the bottom of your deck.

name: Kuzco's Palace
fullName: Kuzco's Palace - Home of the Emperor
text: CITY WALLS Whenever a character is challenged and banished while here, banish the challenging character.

name: Captain Hook
text:
NEMESIS During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.
MAN-TO-MAN Characters named Peter Pan lose Evasive and can't gain Evasive.

name: Peter Pan
text:
Shift 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Peter Pan.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
YOU'RE NEXT! Whenever he challenges a Pirate character, this character takes no damage from the challenge.

name: RLS Legacy
text:
THIS IS OUR SHIP Characters gain Evasive while here. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
HEAVE TOGETHER NOW If you have a character here, you pay 2 {I} less to move a character of yours here.

name: Gramma Tala
fullName: Gramma Tala - Spirit of the Ocean
text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Gramma Tala.)
DO YOU KNOW WHO YOU ARE? Whenever a card is put into your inkwell, gain 1 lore.

name: Scrooge McDuck
fullName: Scrooge McDuck - Richest Duck in the World
text:
I'M GOING HOME! During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
I DIDN'T GET RICH BY BEING STUPID During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may play an item for free.

name: Belle's House
text: LABORATORY If you have a character here, you pay 1 {I} less to play items.

name: Mickey Mouse
text: SOUND THE CALL {E}, 2 {I} — Play a character for free.

name: Robin Hood
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Robin Hood.)
SKILLED COMBATANT During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, gain 2 lore.
THE GOOD OF OTHERS When this character is banished in a challenge, you may draw a card.

name: And Then Along Came Zeus
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Deal 5 damage to chosen character or location.

name: Agustin Madrigal
flavor_text: Falling for Julieta was the easiest thing he'd ever done.

name: Alma Madrigal
text: TO THE TABLE When you play this character, you may search your deck for a Madrigal character card and reveal that card to all players. Shuffle your deck and put that card on top of it.
flavor_text:
"Let's be clear, Abuela runs this show."
—Mirabel

name: Ariel
text: Singer 7 (This character counts as cost 7 to sing songs.)
flavor_text: "Watch and you'll see—some day I'll be part of your world!"

name: Cinderella
text:
Singer 9 (This character counts as cost 9 to sing songs.)
BEAUTIFUL VOICE Whenever this character sings a song, your other Princess characters get +1 {L} this turn.

name: Cogsworth
text: AS YOU WERE! Whenever this character quests, you may give chosen character -2 {S} until the start of your next turn.

—Grandmother Fa

text:
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
Resist +2 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

text:
Shift 7

name: Stabbington Brother
text: CRIME OF OPPORTUNITY When you play this character, chosen opponent loses 1 lore.

name: Toby

text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

INTIMIDATING AND AWE-INSPIRING Whenever one of your characters challenges, they gain Resist +2 during that challenge. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

name: Goofy
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

text:
Shift 5 (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mulan.)

text: SPITEFUL During your turn, when this character is banished, if one of your characters was damaged this turn, gain 2 lore.

name: Faline
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Anna
text: WE CAN DO THIS TOGETHER When you play this character, if you have a character named Elsa in play, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Jasmine

text: LET ME HELP When you play this character, you may remove up to 1 damage from chosen character.
