flavor_text: "I am the stuff of nightmares lurking in the hidden recesses of your mind!"

name: Nana
text: HELPFUL INSTINCTS When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character with cost 2 or less to their player's hand.

name: Magica De Spell
text:
Shift 7 {I} (You may pay 7 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Magica De Spell.)
SHADOW'S GRASP When you play this character, if you used Shift to play her, you may draw 4 cards.

name: Demona
fullName: Demona - Scourge of the Wyvern Clan
text:
AD SAXUM COMMUTATE When you play this character, exert all opposing characters. Then, each player with fewer than 3 cards in their hand draws until they have 3.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

name: Hades
text: WHAT D'YA SAY? When you play this character, you may choose an opposing character. If you do, draw 2 cards unless that character’s player puts that card on the bottom of their deck.
flavor_text: "I'm kind of on a schedule here—I got plans for August."

name: Olaf
text: SECOND CHANCE When this character leaves play, you may return chosen character of yours to your hand.
flavor_text: "Here, hold this while I get help. Try not to go anywhere."

name: Merlin
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
LEGACY OF LEARNING When this character is banished in a challenge, if he had a card under him, draw 2 cards.

name: Ursula
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
SLIPPERY SPELL While there's a card under this character, she gets +1 {L} and gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Cheshire Cat
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
IT'S LOADS OF FUN Whenever you put a card under this character, you may move up to 2 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

name: Begone!
text: Return chosen character, item, or location with cost 3 or less to their player's hand.
flavor_text: "Alakazam, alakazook, send this page back to its book!"

name: Can't Hold It Back Anymore
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Exert chosen opposing character. Move all damage counters from all other characters to that character.

name: Swooping Strike
text: Each opponent chooses and exerts one of their ready characters.
flavor_text: You could try to run...

name: Performance Review
text: {E} chosen ready character of yours to draw cards equal to that character’s {L}.
flavor_text: "Listen, fellas, it's a real 'what have you done for me lately' business. So give me something to work with here!"

name: Fragile as a Flower
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Draw a card. Exert chosen character with cost 2 or less. They can't ready at the start of their next turn.

name: Junior Woodchuck Guidebook
text: THE BOOK KNOWS EVERYTHING {E}, 1 {I}, Banish this item — Draw 2 cards.
flavor_text:
"How come ghosts get a whole section, but not were-ducks?!"
—Huey

name: Grimorum Arcanorum
text:
DOCTRINA ADDUCERE During your turn, whenever an opposing character becomes exerted, gain 1 lore.
CELERITAS Your characters named Demona gain Rush. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: The Great Illuminary
text: STARTLING DISCOVERY Characters gain " {E} — Draw a card" while here.
flavor_text: "Remember, we're looking for clues to who tore up the lorebook pages." —Elisa Maza

name: Baloo
flavor_text: "I tell ya, for a spooky forest, this place is all right. Plenty of berries, lots of trees for back-scratching... A bear could do a lot worse."

name: Big Nose
flavor_text:
"Thou art pretty as a brawl
Thy hair's as dark as a moonless night
Thy cheeks the red of leaves in fall—
I love to sit and watch you fight"

name: Flotsam
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "You're in our world now."

name: Kaa
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "It's bessst to play it s-ssafe."

name: Webby Vanderquack
text: CONTAGIOUS ENERGY When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "It's happening! IT'S HAPPENING! There's a whisper nearby, and I get to see it!"

name: Finnick
text: YOU BETTER RUN When you play this character, you may pay 2 {I} to return chosen opposing character with 2 {S} or less to their player's hand.

name: Vladimir
text: HIGH STANDARDS Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen item.
flavor_text: His commitment to excellent craftsmanship is unparalleled.

name: Flintheart Glomgold
text: TRY ME While you have a character or location in play with a card under them, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "Long live Glomgold! Glomgold! Glomgold!"

name: Jetsam
text: AMBUSH FROM THE DEEP When you play this character, deal 3 damage to chosen opposing damaged character.
flavor_text: "You're coming with us."

name: Hook Hand
flavor_text: "You're a strange lookin' glimmer, ain'tcha?" he said to the whisper lingering uncertainly in the doorway. "Welcome to the Snuggly Duckling!"

name: Kaa
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: It's hard to tell where the branches end and the snake begins.

name: Emily Quackfaster
text: RECOMMENDED READING When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.
flavor_text: "Hana's Herborium? The book that Illumineer wrote? Our only copy has been checked out, sadly."

name: Flynn Rider
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck face down under this character.)
I'LL TAKE THAT As long as this character has at least one card under it, it gets +2 {S} and +1 {L}.

name: Bellwether
text: VENDETTA When this character is challenged and banished, put 1 damage counter on each opposing character.
flavor_text: "I will have sweet revenge!"

name: Launchpad
text: OFF THE MAP When you play this character, you may banish chosen location.
flavor_text: "You can't spell 'crash-landed' without 'landed'!"

name: Penumbra
flavor_text: "You will treat the vastly superior Moon with respect, or you will suffer the ultimate consequence."

name: Baloo
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Baloo.)
ROLL WITH IT When you play this character, choose one:
- Each player draws a card.
- Each player chooses and discards a card.

name: Megara
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
I'LL BE FINE While there's a card under this character, she gets +1 {L} and gains "Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent chooses and discards a card."

name: Goldie O'Gilt
text:
CLAIM JUMPER When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a location card of your choice.
STRIKE GOLD Whenever this character quests, you may put a location card from chosen player's discard on the bottom of their deck to gain 1 lore.

name: Shere Khan
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
ON THE HUNT Whenever this character quests, banish chosen opposing damaged character. Then, you may put 1 damage counter on another chosen character.

name: Scrooge McDuck
text:
BACKUP PLAN When you play this character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
ON THE MOVE When this character is challenged, return this card to your hand. (No damage is dealt in that challenge.)

name: Akela
text: AHEAD OF THE PACK 1 {I} — This character gets +1 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "Follow me, if you can," Akela said, bounding into the Bitterwood. "The hunt is on!"

name: Goofy
text:
EVEN THE SCORE Whenever one of your other Emerald characters is challenged and banished, banish the challenging character.
PROVIDE COVER Your other Emerald characters gain Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

name: Little John
text:
Boost 3 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 3 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
READY TO RASSLE Whenever you put a card under this character, ready him.

name: Webby Vanderquack
text:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Webby Vanderquack.)
Ward
WORK SMARTER Whenever this character quests, if an opponent has more cards in their inkwell than you, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: So Be It!
text: Each of your characters gets +1 {S} this turn. You may banish chosen item.
flavor_text: He's a patient merman—up to a point.

name: Trust In Me
text:
(A character with cost 6 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Choose one:
- Each opposing character gets -1 until the start of your next turn.
- Each opponent chooses and discards 2 cards.

name: Chomp!
text: Deal 2 damage to chosen damaged character.
flavor_text:
Mickey: "What IS that thing?!"
Goofy: "It's hungry, that's what!"

name: Malicious, Mean, and Scary
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Put 1 damage counter on each opposing character.
flavor_text: My sneer could curdle dairy

name: Potion of Malice
text:
SUPPRESSED ANGER {E}, 1 {I} — Put 1 damage counter on chosen character.
MINDLESS RAGE {E}, Banish this item – Each opposing damaged character gains Reckless until the start of your next turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)

name: Inscrutable Map
text: BACKTRACK {E}, 1 {I} — Chosen opposing character gets -1 {L} until the start of your next turn.
flavor_text:
Nick: "What kind of nonsense is this?"
Judy: "These symbols must mean something..."

name: Enigmatic Inkcaster
text: ITS OWN REWARD {E} — If you've played 2 or more cards this turn, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: "Whoever's room this was, I think we just found their inkcaster." —Shanzay, an Illumineer

name: Blessed Bagpipes
text:
MCDUCK HEIRLOOM When you play this item, you may put the top card of your deck facedown under one of your characters or locations with Boost.
BATTLE ANTHEM Whenever one of your characters or locations with a card under them is challenged, gain 1 lore.

name: White Agony Plains
text: PURE LIQUID GOLD This location gets +1 {L} for each character here.

name: Diablo
flavor_text:
"Be careful when gathering herbs in the Inkwell Caverns. You never know who's watching."
—Hana's Herborium

name: Ares
text: Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.) CALL TO BATTLE Once during your turn, whenever you put a card under one of your characters or locations, you may ready chosen character. If you do, that character can't quest for the rest of this turn.

name: Peter Pan
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "Wanna race? Last one through the Inkwell Caverns is a codfish!"

name: Tinker Bell
flavor_text:
"Okay, now we know pixie dust doesn't affect the torn lorebook pages. Thanks, Tink."
—Venturo, an Illumineer

name: Raksha
text: ON PATROL Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} less to move this character to a location.
flavor_text: Her name means "protection," and she'll do anything to defend the cubs under her care.

name: Shere Khan
flavor_text: "Jungle or forest, it doesn't matter. I'd recognize the scent of man anywhere."

name: Rama
text: PROTECTION OF THE PACK Whenever you play another character with 5 {S} or more, you may ready this character. If you do, he can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: With cubs to protect, any strange sound must be investigated.

name: Mother Gothel
text: SOMEBODY'S GOT TO USE IT If a character was banished this turn, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: "The world is a cruel place, and sometimes you've got to be a little cruel to get by."

name: Katrina Van Tassel
flavor_text: She danced the night away, hoping to find someone who could keep up with her.

name: Hermes
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text: "What do you mean, 'late'? Kid, I was ahead of my time before time was invented."

name: Beast
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
THAT'S MINE Whenever he challenges another character, if there's a card under this character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

name: Bronx
text:
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

name: Tinker Bell
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tinker Bell.)
HARMLESS DIVERSION When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character with 2 {S} or less.

name: David Xanatos
text:
LEARN FROM EVERYTHING During your turn, whenever one of your characters is banished, draw a card.
WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR? Whenever this character quests, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: Hans
text:
JOSTLING FOR POWER King and Queen characters can't quest.
GROWING INFLUENCE At the start of your turn, if an opponent has 2 or more ready characters in play, gain 2 lore.

name: Hercules
text:
EVER VIGILANT This character can't be dealt damage unless he's being challenged.
EVER VALIANT While this character is exerted, your other Hero characters can't be dealt damage unless they're being challenged.

name: Goliath
text:
BE CAREFUL, ALL OF YOU Whenever one of your Gargoyle characters challenges another character, gain 1 lore.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

name: Brooklyn
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.
flavor_text: "If they think we're beasts and monsters..."

name: Donald Duck
text:
HIGH ENERGY Your other Ruby characters get +1 {S}.
POWERFUL REWARD Your other Ruby characters with 7 {S} or more get +1 {L}.

name: Elisa Maza
text: SPECIAL DETAIL While you have 2 or more other characters in play with 5 {S} or more, this character gets +2 {L}.
flavor_text: "Now, you can let me look the place over, or I can come back with a warrant and a lot more cops. Your call."

name: Aladdin
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
ONLY THE BOLD While there's a card under this character, your characters with Reckless gain "{E} — Gain 1 lore."

name: Lady Tremaine
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
EXPEDIENT SCHEMES Whenever this character quests, if you've put a card under her this turn, you may play an action with cost 5 or less from your discard for free, then put that action card on the bottom of your deck instead of into your discard.

name: The Headless Horseman
fullName: The Headless Horseman - Terror of Sleepy Hollow
text:
LEAVES NO TRACE When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 2 {S} or less.
GATHERING STRENGTH During your turn, whenever an opposing character is banished, each of your characters gets +1 {S} this turn.

name: Mulan
text: FLOWING BLADE During your turn, if you've put a card under one of your characters or locations this turn, this character takes no damage from challenges.

name: Brom Bones
text: ROUGH AND TUMBLE Whenever this character challenges a character with 2 {S} or less, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavor_text: "Hold on, schoolmaster! That's a mighty big book. Let me take that for you!"

name: Shere Khan
text:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Shere Khan.)
WILD RAGE 1 {I}, Deal 1 damage to this character — Ready this character. He can't quest for the rest of this turn.

name: Next Stop, Olympus
text:
ACTION If you have a character with 5 {S} or more in play, you pay 2 {I} less to play this action.
Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn. The next time they challenge another character this turn, gain 1 lore.

name: Get to Safety!
text: Play a location with cost 3 or less from your discard for free. Then, if you have a location named Sleepy Hollow in play, draw a card.
flavor_text: Run scared if you must—but whatever you do, RUN!

name: Time to Go!
text: Banish chosen character of yours to draw 2 cards. If that character had a card under them, draw 3 cards instead.
flavor_text: "What are you doing here when there's a rogue horseman out there? Have you lost your head?" —Gaston

name: Ghostly Tale
text: Exert all opposing characters with 2 {S} or less.
flavor_text: Brom emphasized every frightful detail, determined to scare his rival.

name: Dragon Fire
text: Banish chosen character.
flavor_text: Never underestimate the wrath of a dragon.

name: Mushu's Rocket
text:
I NEED FIREPOWER When you play this item, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
HITCH A RIDE 2 {I}, Banish this item — Chosen character gains Rush this turn.

name: The Bitterwood
text: GATHER RESOURCES Once during your turn, whenever you move a character with 5 {S} or more here, you may draw a card.

name: Sleepy Hollow
text: HEAD FOR THE BRIDGE! Whenever a character quests while here, you may banish this location to gain 2 lore and give them Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Judy Hopps
text: HIDDEN CLUES When you play this character, if you have another Detective character in play, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "More torn lorebook pages! Who could have done this?"

name: Hen Wen
text: FUTURE SIGHT Whenever this character quests, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavor_text:
"She's a special pig, Taran."
—Dallben

name: Anna
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "Come on—there's tons to do! Skating and snow forts and sledding and hot chocolate!"

name: Chef Louis
fullName: Chef Louis - In Over His Head
flavor_text:
"When added to a clear soup, the pale, triple-pointed leaves of Trispiritus can have a restorative effect. CAUTION: DO NOT confuse it with Three Thorns, which causes itchy rashes."
—Hana's Herborium

name: Daisy Duck
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "If I'm reading this right, these aren't actually ghosts at all! Boy, you're lucky I came along on this one."

name: Cri-Kee
text: Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavor_text: "Small glimmers may feel safe in the jungle around the Mysterious Ruins, where they can easily go unnoticed." —Hana's Herborium

name: Rapunzel
text: ENSNARL When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -3 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "Well, that should slow you down for a minute."

name: Fergus McDuck
text: TOUGHEN UP When you play this character, chosen character of yours gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "Ach, close the secret entrance! You're letting all the mysterious air out!"

name: Li Shang
flavor_text: The sound of hoofbeats filled the air. Li Shang moved his men into position, ready to turn the tables on their pursuer.

name: Genie
flavor_text: "You know, most books are a lot more compelling when you read the pages in order..."

name: Scuttle
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: Whoa! The wind's all of a sudden on the move here.

name: Ichabod Crane
text: WELL-READ Whenever this character quests, if you've played a character with cost 5 or more this turn, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Jasmine
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
UPLIFTING AURA Whenever this character quests, if there’s a card under her, remove up to 3 damage from each of your characters.

name: Judy Hopps
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Judy Hopps.)
LATERAL THINKING During your turn, your Detective characters gain Alert and Resist +2. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive. Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

name: The Sultan
flavor_text: Never mind what the Curator intended these trinkets for; the sultan found his own use for them soon enough.

name: Ichabod Crane
fullName: Ichabod Crane - Scared Out of His Mind
text: CHILLING TALE When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "Every small detail in Brom's awful story returned to haunt his recollection." —Narrator

name: Scar
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST Whenever you put a card under this character, chosen opposing character gets -5 {S} this turn.

name: Daisy Duck
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Daisy Duck.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
STRANGE HAPPENINGS While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

name: Cinderella
text: WHATEVER YOU WISH FOR At the end of your turn, if you played a Princess character this turn, you may put a card from your hand into your inkwell facedown to draw a card.

name: Judy Hopps
text: THOROUGH INVESTIGATION When you play this character and whenever she quests, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Detective character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Pluto
text: ON THE TRAIL {E} — If you have a Detective character in play, return an item card from your discard to your hand. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.
flavor_text: Every detective can use an assistant to sniff out clues.

name: Daisy Duck
text:
STAND FAST Your other Sapphire characters gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
LOOK AHEAD Whenever one of your other Sapphire characters quests, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

name: Kristoff
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
WORTH MINING Whenever this character quests, if there's a card under him, put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Mickey Mouse
text: GET A CLUE When you play this character, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: The clues all pointed toward ghosts, but he knew there was something more going on here.

name: Hen Wen's Visions
text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put 1 on the top of your deck and the rest on the bottom in any order.
flavor_text:
"Hen Wen, from you I do beseech Knowledge that lies beyond my reach..."
—Taran

name: Promising Lead
text: Chosen character gets +1 {L} and gains Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "The books on these pages match up with those shelves. And the ley lines... The answer's right here!" —Judy Hopps

name: Might Solve a Mystery
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 1 character card and up to 1 item card and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Sudden Scare
text: Put chosen opposing character into their player's inkwell facedown. That player puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown.

name: Spooky Sight
text: Put all characters with cost 3 or less into their players' inkwells facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: "We've got to get out of here!" —Mickey Mouse

name: Detective's Badge
text: PROTECT AND SERVE {E}, 1 {I} — Chosen character gains Resist +1 and the Detective classification until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "It's not just a badge. It's who we are. There's no greater honor." — Detective Judy Hopps

name: Ink Amplifier
text: ENERGY CAPTURE Whenever an opponent draws a card during their turn, if it's the second card they've drawn this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: With a crackle of energy, the strange device lit up when the glimmers entered the study.

name: Fairy Godmother's Wand
text: ONLY TILL MIDNIGHT During your turn, whenever you put a card into your inkwell, chosen Princess character of yours gains Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)
flavor_text: Sometimes a glimpse is all you need.

name: Inkrunner
text:
PREFLIGHT CHECK When you play this item, draw a card.
READY TO RIDE {E}, 1 {I} - Chosen character gains Alert this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

name: Castle of the Horned King
fullName: Castle of the Horned King - Bastion of Evil
text: INTO THE GLOOM Once during your turn, whenever a character quests while here, you may ready chosen item.

name: Robin Hood
text:
Boost 1 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 1 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
EXPERT SHOT Whenever this character quests, if there's a card under him, deal 1 damage to up to 2 chosen characters.

name: Donald Duck
text: RAISE A RUCKUS When you play this character, chosen Detective character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text: "Let's show those rotten ghosts who's in charge! You go first."

name: Goliath
text:
DUSK TO DAWN At the end of each player's turn, if they have more than 2 cards in their hand, they choose and discard cards until they have 2. If they have fewer than 2 cards in their hand, they draw until they have 2.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.

name: The Headless Horseman
text:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named The Headless Horseman.)
WITCHING HOUR When you play this character, each player draws 3 cards, then discards 3 cards at random. Choose an opposing character and deal 2 damage to them for each action card discarded this way.

name: Clawhauser
text: Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavor_text: It was only a crumb, but Clawhauser knew it was a small piece of a larger mystery.

name: Francine
text: Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: Francine stared at the torn page, trying to take her mind off Higgins and his pursuit of the littering mastermind. Was he ready for the danger of undercover work?

name: Inspector Tezuka
text: Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavor_text:
"Stand back. I'll handle this."
—Inspector Tezuka

name: Nick Wilde
flavor_text: "Okay, Nick, it's time to use those superior sleuthing skills to find a way out of this. Wait, why am I talking to myself?"

name: Basil
text: HOLD YOUR GROUND Whenever you play another Detective character, this character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "It's time to make a stand!"

name: Hudson
text:

text: Draw a card. If you have a Seven Dwarfs character and a Princess character in play, you may play a Seven Dwarfs character for free.

name: Don't Be Nervous
text: Search your deck for a Princess character card, reveal that card to all players, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If you have 2 or more Seven Dwarfs characters in play, draw 2 cards and gain 2 lore.

name: Super Suit
text:
SIMPLE, ELEGANT When you play this item, if you have a Hero character in play, gain 1 lore.
SUIT UP {E}, 2 {I} — If you played a Hero character this turn, draw a card.

name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
text:
TORN APART This item enters play exerted.
MEND THE BOND {E}, Banish this item — Each player shuffles all character cards from their discard into their deck.

name: Ring of Stones
fullName: Ring of Stones - Place of Legends
text:
FOLLOW YOUR FATE Your exerted characters can move here for free.
PART THE VEIL Once during your turn, whenever a character moves here, gain 1 lore.

name: Merida
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "'Stay in camp, Merida.' 'Be an example, Merida.' What could it hurt to go out and explore? I'll stay on the vine and they'll never even know."

name: Hamish, Hubert & Harris
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text:
"Oh, aye, they're slippery little devils. Ye should see what they did to the garden."
—Merida

name: Young MacGuffin
flavor_text: "There's something wrong with these flowers, Da. They make me feel funny, like I dinnae want to fight them."

name: Tod
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: "Look, I counted to ten before I started climbing. You all should have found better hiding spots than the top of a tree."

name: Helga Sinclair
text: CRISIS MANAGEMENT If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.
flavor_text: "Once again, I find myself cleaning up someone else's mess."

name: The Witch
text: UNSATISFIED CUSTOMERS Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent loses 1 lore.
flavor_text: "This is the perfect place to set up shop! That vine adds just the right rustic feel."

name: The Queen
text: UNEQUALED CRUELTY While an opposing damaged character is in play, this character gets +2 {S}.
flavor_text: "With such a gift to further the Council's goals, soon all will tremble before my power."

name: Buzz Lightyear
flavor_text: "Environment appears habitable, but the flora seems to have undergone some strange mutations. Could be Zurg's influence."

name: RC
text: LOW BATTERIES This character can't quest or challenge unless you pay 1 {I}. (You pay this cost each time.)
flavor_text: Racing around Andy's room is fun, but he really loves going off road.

name: Lord MacGuffin
text: WAIT FOR IT... This character may enter play exerted to deal 3 damage to chosen damaged character.
flavor_text: "We'll find our way back to the Illuminary if we have to fight through every plant in Lorcana."

name: Lenny
text:
TAKE A GOOD LOOK When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards an action card of your choice.
COMIN' UP FAST Once during your turn, whenever you play an action, you may ready this character.

name: Gaetan Moliere
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
UNEARTH Whenever this character quests, you may draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards.

name: Peter Pan
fullName: Peter Pan - Searching Far and Wide
flavor_text: "I've already checked the whole jungle. He's got to be around here somewhere!"

name: Milo Thatch
fullName: Milo Thatch - Getting His Hands Dirty
text:
Ward
SCHOLAR'S GAMBIT When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character to their player's hand.
PRACTICAL KNOWLEDGE At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.

name: Alien
text:
WE ARE ONE This character gets +1 {S} for each other Toy character you have in play.
HE HAS BEEN CHOSEN During your turn, when this character is banished, return another character card named Alien from your discard to your hand.

name: Donald Duck
text: BURNING CURIOSITY Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text: In the wilderness of Lorcana, a little luck goes a long way.

name: Buzz Lightyear
text:
SECRET MISSION Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a non-character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
WORLD'S GREATEST TOY Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a character, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing damaged character.

name: Elinor
text: COORDINATED EFFORTS At the end of your turn, if you have 3 or more exerted characters in play, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character, gain 1 lore, and draw a card.

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
fullName: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Adventurer for Hire
text:
EYE FOR VALUE When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
DIRTY TRICKS At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, each opponent loses 1 lore.

name: Joshua Sweet
text: NO PATIENCE Whenever this character is challenged, chosen opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text: "It's barely a scratch! Get some rest and you'll be fine. No arguing—doctor's orders."

name: Merida
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Merida.)
FIERCE PROTECTION While this character is exerted, whenever an opposing character challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the challenging character.

name: The Queen
text:
EVIL SCHEME When you play this character, you may draw a card. If you do, each opponent gains 2 lore.
JEALOUS HEART While an opponent has more lore than you, this character gets +2 {L}.

name: Buzz Lightyear
text:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Buzz Lightyear.)
TAKE CHARGE When you play this character, you may return an action card with cost 7 or less from your discard to your hand.
ADVANCED TRAINING Whenever you play an action, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.

name: Cruella De Vil
text: YOU'RE OUT OF FASHION Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.
flavor_text: "Can I help you? Not with your sense of style, darling."

name: Helga Sinclair
text: COMBAT TRAINING Whenever this character quests, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character. If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, deal 2 damage instead.
flavor_text: She'll take on anything for the right price.

name: The Huntsman
fullName: The Huntsman - On the Queen's Orders
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text:
"Even you wouldn't be fool enough to disobey my orders a second time."
—The Queen

name: Strange Things
text:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Up to 2 chosen characters can't quest until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.

name: Sabotage
text: Banish chosen item or location and all other items or locations with the same name.
flavor_text: "Ha! That worked even better than last time."

name: The Family Scattered
text: Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on the top of their deck.

name: Buzz's Arm
text:
MISSING PIECE If a character named Buzz Lightyear was banished this turn, you may play this item for free.
SOME ASSEMBLY REQUIRED {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next action or item you play this turn.

name: The Claw
text: THE CLAW CHOOSES {E}, 2 {I}, Banish one of your characters — Return chosen opposing character to their player's hand.
flavor_text:
"Trust in the Claw. It shall lift us from this terrible place!" 
—Alien

name: Gyro-Evac
text:
TAKE HER UP {E}, 1 {I} — Chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
CRASH LANDING {E}, Banish this item — Each player loses 2 lore.

name: Merida's Bow
text:
EASY SHOT When you play this item, deal 1 damage to chosen character.
FINAL ARROW 1 {I}, Banish this item — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

name: Pizza Planet
text:
YOU ARE CLEAR TO ENTER Your Toy characters can move here for free.
HEAVILY GUARDED Whenever a character is challenged while here, each opponent loses 1 lore.

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)
PLAN'S CHANGED When you play this character, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then, you may return an action card with cost 4 or less from your discard to your hand.

name: Mr. Incredible
flavor_text: Dropping weight and getting in shape!

name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke
fullName: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Looking for His Moment
flavor_text: "You have to be ready to take advantage of any opportunity. And this vine? Looks like a pretty big opportunity."

name: Pegasus
text: Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavor_text: Lorcana had changed. It felt bigger somehow. But no matter how big it got, he was determined to find his friend.

name: Audrey Ramirez
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text: "I love a machine that gets me in the action even faster!"

name: Milo Thatch
text: FASCINATING DISCOVERY During your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, this character gets +1 {L}.
flavor_text: "Just think, Amazu—without the vine, we might never have discovered these ruins!"

name: Zeus
text: IMMORTAL WOUND This character enters play with 4 damage.
flavor_text: "I am the ruler of Olympus! I refuse to be defeated by a bunch of flowers!"

name: Preston Whitmore
text: PRICE OF PROGRESS When you play this character, you may put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard.
flavor_text: "I promised all of you I'd keep your secrets. And Preston Whitmore always keeps a promise."

name: Jingle Joe
text: TURN OUT THE LIGHT During your turn, whenever one of your other Toy characters is banished, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Wind-Up Frog
text: ADDED TRACTION If one of your Toy characters was banished this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.
flavor_text:
"I made it cooler. Who cares about some dumb hopping frog, when it can have wheels?"
—Sid

name: Roller Bob
text: TIME TO MOVE When you play this character, you may put 2 character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck to give this character Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

name: Hand-in-the-Box
text: SPRING-LOADED You may put a Toy character card from your discard on the bottom of your deck to play this character for free.
flavor_text:
"Ah! How does that still startle me every time?"
—Woody

name: Daisy Duck
text: BREAK IS OVER Whenever this character quests, if you played a character this turn, you may ready another chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.
flavor_text: "Time to go. I don't want to miss that sunset!"

name: Copper
flavor_text: "I'll clear this ol' vine out, if I have to do it one root at a time."

name: Jebidiah Farnsworth
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
flavor_text: "Anything's edible if ya fry it!"

name: Dash Parr
text: Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text:
"You can't outrun your chores, young man!"
—Helen Parr

name: Babyhead
text:
TIGHTEN THE BOLTS Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen character gets +2 {S} this turn.
REPLACEMENT PARTS During your turn, whenever one of your other characters is banished, draw a card.

name: Bouncing Ducky
text:
REJECTED TOYS For each Toy character card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
REPURPOSED When you play this character, put all Toy character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Jack-Jack Parr
text:
WEIRD THINGS ARE HAPPENING At the start of your turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your discard. If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.

name: Queen of Hearts
text: ROYAL COMMAND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)
flavor_text: Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.

name: Hercules
text: HEROIC SACRIFICE When you play this character, you may discard your hand. If you do, return a card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: "I don't care what the Fates say. I make my own destiny."

name: Vincenzo Santorini
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
NEUTRALIZE Opposing items can't ready at the start of their players' turns.

name: The Leviathan
text: IT'S A MACHINE! When you play this character, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may banish any number of chosen opposing characters with total {S} 10 or less.

name: Sid Phillips
text:
PLAYTIME'S OVER When you play this character, you may banish another chosen character of yours. If you do, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
DOUBLE PRIZES! During your turn, whenever a Toy character is banished, gain 2 lore.

name: Mr. Incredible
text:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mr. Incredible.)
ALWAYS UNITED This character gets +2 {S} for each other character you have in play.
LET'S DO THIS! Whenever one of your Super characters challenges another character, draw a card.

name: Pterodactyl Janie Doll
text: DOUBLE TRANSPLANT During your turn, when this character is banished, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.
flavor_text:
"The first step of her transformation is complete."
—Sid

name: Inner Strength
text: Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn. Draw a card.
flavor_text: Just when you think you've given it all you've got, sometimes you can give a little more.

name: Firefly Swarm
text:
Choose one:
• Banish chosen character with 2 {S} or less.
• If 2 or more other cards were put into your discard this turn, banish chosen character.

name: Like A Bird In the Sky
fullName: Like A Bird In the Sky
text:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Chosen character gets +1 {L} and gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

name: Hero Work
text: Your characters get +1 {S} this turn. Your Hero characters gain "Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore" this turn.
flavor_text:
"It's a whole family of Supers!" 
—Syndrome

name: Dangerous Plan
text: Draw 2 cards. Then, discard a card at random.
flavor_text:
Audrey: "This was your plan?!"
Milo: "I didn't anticipate the flowers, but it can still work!"

name: Amazu's Inkcaster
text: ON THE HORIZON {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavor_text:
"It always points the way to new adventures."
—Amazu, an Illumineer

name: Remote Inklands
text:
ERODING WINDS At the start of your turn, put the top card of your deck into your discard.
SUCCESSFUL EXPEDITION Characters get +2 {S} while here.

name: Leviathan's Lair
text: LOST TO THE DUNES When this location is banished, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
flavor_text: Enter the lair of the leviathan.

name: Robin Hood
flavor_text: "I say, those glowing symbols look interesting. I think it's time to go in for a closer look!"

name: Prince Charming
flavor_text: From a distance this had looked like any other cave. But up close . . .

name: Merryweather
text: Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
flavor_text: "We'll need a fire! A nice blue fire, of course."

name: Fauna
text: Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
flavor_text: "Oh dear, let me help you with that."

name: Flora
text: LUMINOUS SHELTER When you play this character, your other characters gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "While you two finish up, I'll add protective charms. Pink, of course."

name: Mirabel Madrigal
text: THIS WILL HELP When you play this character, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
flavor_text: "We'll get you something to eat when we get to camp. For now, you should drink this."

name: Syndrome
text: Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavor_text: The fifth Rule of Villainy: The best way to get revenge on your enemies? Lots of practice.

name: Kida
text: NATURAL DEFENSE When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text:
"I may be far from home, but I still know how to snare an intruder."
—Kida

name: Gadget Hackwrench
text:
TIME TO TINKER When you play this character, you may play an item with cost 3 or less for free.
WELL SUPPLIED Your characters with Support get +1 {L}.

name: Norton Nimnul
text: DEVITALIZER RAY Once during your turn, whenever you play an item, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.
flavor_text: "Another successful test! This brilliant devitalizer ray technology will be my finest invention yet!"

name: Gadget Hackwrench
fullName: Gadget Hackwrench - Finder of Lost Parts
text: USEFUL BITS When this character leaves play, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: "Golly, I can't believe I almost left the safety pin behind. It's the key to everything!"

name: Zipper
flavor_text:
"Crikey! I've seen fellas who are twice the size with half the heart as that wee dodger!"
—Monterey Jack

name: Edna Mode
text:
KEY ACCESSORY {E} — Ready chosen item.
ALL THE BASICS While you have an item named Super Suit in play, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

name: Zipper
text:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Zipper.)
BUZZING ENTHUSIASM Whenever this character quests, you may add his {W} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.

name: Luisa Madrigal
text: SHOULDER THE BURDEN Whenever this character quests, you may move up to 3 damage from chosen character to this character.
flavor_text: "Who needs a break? I'm fine! I got this!"

name: Dr. Sara Bellum
fullName: Dr. Sara Bellum - Head of Research
text: SCIENTIFIC SCRUTINY When you play this character, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.
flavor_text: "Fascinating. What unusual markings! I can't wait to bring my findings back to S.H.U.S.H."

name: Isabela Madrigal
text:
FEEL BETTER When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may move all damage from chosen character of yours to this character.
SELF-CARE At the end of your turn, you may remove all damage from this character.

name: Bruno Madrigal
text:
FIND THAT VISION Once during your turn, whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
YOU'LL BE OKAY Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

name: Cinderella
text: THIS AND THAT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.

name: Bruno Madrigal
text: CHANGE THE OUTCOME When you play this character, you may look at the top card of chosen player's deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of their deck.
flavor_text: "It's so hard to make out . . . I think it's something buried deep underground."

name: Kida
text: READ THE RUNES Whenever this character quests, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Kashekim
text: STRENGTH IN MEMORY At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown.
flavor_text: "The power here is buried deep in the sands."

name: Minnie Mouse
text: DISCERNING EYE Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text: "I found a shortcut just over the ridge. We'll be at the oasis in no time!"

name: Kida
Ursula
text:
QUITE THE BARGAIN When you play this character and whenever she quests, another chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
BY THE WAY At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, put chosen character of yours into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Someone Will Lose His Head
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Each opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

name: What Else Can I Do?
text:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted. If a character sang this song, your characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

name: Escape Plan
text:
You can't play this action unless 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn.
Each player chooses 2 of their characters and puts them into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

name: Salvage Operation
text: Return an item card from your discard to your hand. If you have a character with 4 {W} or more in play, gain 1 lore.
flavor_text:
"Can you lift the Ranger Plane up a little higher, Zipper? I've just about got it."
—Gadget Hackwrench

name: Julieta's Arepas
text:
FLAVORFUL CURE At the start of your turn, if you have a Madrigal character in play, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
THAT DID THE TRICK {E} — If you removed damage from a character this turn, gain 1 lore.

name: Ranger Plane
text:
AIR SUPPORT Your characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
BIG LIFT {E} — Chosen character with 10 {S} or more gets +3 {L} this turn.

name: Gadget's Goggles
text: ENHANCED VISION {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one on the top of your deck and the other on the bottom.
flavor_text:
Dale: "Do you see anything, Gadget?"
Gadget: "Yeah, but I wish I didn't."

name: Shepherd's Journal
text:
MARGIN NOTES When you play this item, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top of your deck or into your discard.
KEY TO THE PUZZLE 1 {I}, Banish this item — Return another item card from your discard to your hand.

name: Casa Madrigal
text: HEALING HOME Whenever a character quests while here, you may remove up to 2 damage from them. Then, you may remove up to 2 damage from this location.

name: Pocahontas
text: WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text:
"Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one."
—Grandmother Willow

name: Syndrome
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Syndrome.)
GOT ME MONOLOGUING! Whenever this character quests, return a Robot character card from your discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.

name: Omnidroid
flavor_text:
"It's bigger! It's badder! Ladies and gentlemen, it's too much for Mr. Incredible!"
—Syndrome

name: Angus
text: DAUNTLESS When you play this character, chosen character gains Alert this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

name: Fergus
text: Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
flavor_text: "Come on then! I'll take ye all on at once!"

name: Wee Dingwall
text: Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)
flavor_text: "No big flower's gonnae block our way, Da. I'll tear it apart with me own hands."

name: Incrediboy
text:
NERDING OUT When you play this character, if a Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.
SPOILER ALERT This character also counts as being named Syndrome for Shift.
flavor_text: "Not every superhero has powers, you know."

name: Violet Parr
text: Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)
flavor_text:
"Keep laughing, Dash. It's time to play 'Bowling for Brothers.'"
—Violet

name: Mrs. Incredible
text: PEP TALK When you play this character, chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text: "You can do this. I believe in you. Now let's show them what we can do!"

name: Young Macintosh
flavor_text: "We've got the strength and we've got the swords. What vine could stand against all of that, right Da?"

name: Lord Macintosh
text: TOUGH IT OUT This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)
flavor_text: "Clan Macintosh fears no flower, vine, or tree. We dinnae mess with shrubs, though."

name: Fat Cat
text: Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "I'm afraid your information is out of date, my dear rodent. I know what the glyphs are for, and more importantly . . . how to use them."

name: Rat Capone
text: SHADAAP! While this character has no damage, he gets +3 {S}.
flavor_text: "Listen here, you no good, dirty cat. We had a deal! Yeah, a deal, see? And you gotta honor it!"

name: Omnidroid
text:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)
ENEMY DETECTED When you play this character, if you used Shift to play it, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.

name: Mr. Incredible
fullName: Mr. Incredible - Taking Out the Trash
text: KA-POW! When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing Robot or Villain character.
flavor_text:
"Heavyweight problems need heavyweight solutions."
—Mr. Incredible

name: Lord Dingwall
text: FIGHTIN' TALK This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text: "Ach, look at the size o' that flower! Let's clear that beastie out before it causes any trouble."

name: Fat Cat
text: WORTHY INVESTMENT Your locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "You don't become the most wanted cat in the realm by playing nice."

name: Maudie
text: Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
flavor_text: "I'm here to look after three bairns, not three bears!"

name: Goofy
text: FALLING ROCKS Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character or location.
flavor_text: "Gawrsh! Look out below!"

name: Omnidroid
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)
ELECTRO-ARMOR While there's a card under this character, it gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

name: Merida
text:
FULL QUIVER When you play this character, you may return an action card named Three Arrows from your discard to your hand.
STEADY AIM Whenever one of your actions deals damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to that character.

name: John Smith
